entityFormationAgency.description: Arizona entity filings and corporation/LLC records.

taxAgency.description: Arizona business tax registration and Transaction Privilege Tax starting point.

licensingPortal.agencyName: Arizona Commerce Authority Small Business Services
licensingPortal.description: Arizona small-business startup and local licensing starting point.

workforceAgency.description: Arizona unemployment insurance and employer tax starting point.

SBDC.agencyName: Arizona Small Business Development Center Network

VBOC.agencyName: SBA Veterans Business Outreach Center program
VBOC.description: SBA VBOC program information and locator starting point.

commonBusinessSetupTasks.title: Review Arizona entity formation requirements
commonBusinessSetupTasks.description: Review the Arizona Corporation Commission formation rules and file the selected entity type when needed.
commonBusinessSetupTasks.whenNeeded: Before using an entity name, opening entity accounts, or applying for an EIN for a new legal entity.
commonBusinessSetupTasks.dependency: Choose the intended legal structure with qualified legal and tax guidance.
commonBusinessSetupTasks.founderNotes: Record the entity choice, filing date, confirmation number, and any professional review.

commonBusinessSetupTasks.title: Search Arizona entity-name records
commonBusinessSetupTasks.description: Search Arizona Corporation Commission entity records before relying on a proposed entity name.
commonBusinessSetupTasks.whenNeeded: Before filing formation documents or spending heavily on branding.
commonBusinessSetupTasks.founderNotes: Record searched names and results. Entity-name availability is not trademark clearance.

commonBusinessSetupTasks.title: Confirm Arizona statutory-agent requirements
commonBusinessSetupTasks.description: Confirm the statutory-agent requirement for the planned Arizona corporation or LLC and maintain an eligible Arizona address.
commonBusinessSetupTasks.whenNeeded: When forming and maintaining an Arizona corporation or LLC.
commonBusinessSetupTasks.founderNotes: Record the statutory agent and acceptance documentation if the entity type requires it.

commonBusinessSetupTasks.title: Review Arizona business-tax registration
commonBusinessSetupTasks.description: Review Arizona Department of Revenue business-tax registration requirements for the planned activity.
commonBusinessSetupTasks.whenNeeded: Before conducting taxable activity or hiring employees.
commonBusinessSetupTasks.dependency: Clarify entity, activity, locations, and EIN needs.
commonBusinessSetupTasks.founderNotes: Record the accounts required for the business activity and filing cadence.

commonBusinessSetupTasks.title: Determine whether an Arizona TPT license is required
commonBusinessSetupTasks.description: Arizona transaction privilege tax is activity-specific. Review whether the business needs an ADOR TPT license and any city or occupational license.
commonBusinessSetupTasks.dependency: Confirm products, services, locations, and operating jurisdictions.
commonBusinessSetupTasks.founderNotes: Record the ADOR determination, TPT account, locations, city requirements, and filing cadence.

commonBusinessSetupTasks.title: Verify city and county business-license requirements
commonBusinessSetupTasks.agency: Arizona Department of Revenue and applicable local agencies
commonBusinessSetupTasks.description: Arizona local business and occupational-license requirements vary by city and activity. Confirm requirements with every operating jurisdiction.
commonBusinessSetupTasks.whenNeeded: Before operating from, selling in, or regularly serving a local jurisdiction.
commonBusinessSetupTasks.dependency: Identify the operating address, service area, and selling locations.
commonBusinessSetupTasks.founderNotes: Record each city and county contacted and the license or written guidance received.

commonBusinessSetupTasks.title: Verify zoning, occupancy, and site rules locally
commonBusinessSetupTasks.agency: Applicable Arizona city or county planning department
commonBusinessSetupTasks.description: Confirm zoning, occupancy, signage, parking, home-occupation, and site-specific rules with the applicable local planning department.
commonBusinessSetupTasks.whenNeeded: Before signing a lease, purchasing a site, or committing to build-out.
commonBusinessSetupTasks.dependency: Identify the proposed operating address and activity.
commonBusinessSetupTasks.founderNotes: Record the local planning contact, parcel or address reviewed, and written response.

commonBusinessSetupTasks.title: Review Arizona small-business resources
commonBusinessSetupTasks.description: Review Arizona Commerce Authority small-business resources and any relevant local economic-development contacts.
commonBusinessSetupTasks.whenNeeded: During planning and before major location or expansion commitments.
commonBusinessSetupTasks.dependency: Prepare a concise business concept and location summary.
commonBusinessSetupTasks.founderNotes: Record relevant programs and local contacts. Verify eligibility directly.

commonBusinessSetupTasks.title: Research Arizona and SBA targeted-business support
commonBusinessSetupTasks.agency: Arizona Commerce Authority and U.S. Small Business Administration
commonBusinessSetupTasks.description: Research current veteran, woman, minority, rural, and other targeted-business support resources that may fit founder-selected attributes.
commonBusinessSetupTasks.whenNeeded: During planning and before applying for a targeted program.
commonBusinessSetupTasks.dependency: Use only founder-selected attributes and verify each program's current criteria.
commonBusinessSetupTasks.founderNotes: Record programs researched and official eligibility confirmations. Self-identification is not certification.

commonBusinessSetupTasks.title: Contact Arizona SBDC
commonBusinessSetupTasks.agency: Arizona Small Business Development Center Network
commonBusinessSetupTasks.description: Use Arizona SBDC advising to review the concept, financial assumptions, and launch checklist.
commonBusinessSetupTasks.whenNeeded: During planning and before major spending commitments.
commonBusinessSetupTasks.dependency: Prepare the current VentureForge outputs for review.
commonBusinessSetupTasks.founderNotes: Record the SBDC office, counselor, meeting date, and follow-up actions.

commonBusinessSetupTasks.title: Apply for an Employer Identification Number directly from the IRS
commonBusinessSetupTasks.description: Use the IRS tool to determine whether the business needs an EIN and apply directly when appropriate. Form a planned legal entity with the state before requesting its EIN.
commonBusinessSetupTasks.whenNeeded: After forming a planned legal entity and before banking, payroll, or tax registrations that require an EIN.
commonBusinessSetupTasks.founderNotes: Apply directly through IRS.gov. Record the EIN confirmation and do not pay a third-party website for an EIN.

commonBusinessSetupTasks.title: Research SCORE mentoring support
commonBusinessSetupTasks.description: Use SCORE's mentoring directory to find business-planning support and review the launch checklist with a mentor.
commonBusinessSetupTasks.whenNeeded: During planning and before major spending commitments.
commonBusinessSetupTasks.founderNotes: Record the mentor contact and the assumptions reviewed.

commonBusinessSetupTasks.title: Research Veterans Business Outreach Center support
commonBusinessSetupTasks.description: Review SBA Veterans Business Outreach Center resources when veteran or military-community business assistance may be useful.
commonBusinessSetupTasks.whenNeeded: During planning, especially when the founder wants veteran or military-community support.
commonBusinessSetupTasks.founderNotes: Record whether VBOC support is relevant and any counselor contact.

commonBusinessSetupTasks.title: Confirm Arizona city/county requirements directly
commonBusinessSetupTasks.agency: Applicable Arizona city or county agency
commonBusinessSetupTasks.description: Some cities, counties, zoning offices, health authorities, and professional boards have requirements that cannot be confirmed from a statewide placeholder. Identify the operating address and contact the local agency directly.
commonBusinessSetupTasks.whenNeeded: Before operating locally, signing a lease, or relying on a local compliance assumption.
commonBusinessSetupTasks.dependency: Identify city, county, operating address, and business activity.
commonBusinessSetupTasks.founderNotes: Record the local agency contacted, date, person or office, and written guidance. This item intentionally has no single statewide URL.

industrySpecificFlags.label: Food, beverage, or health-department review
industrySpecificFlags.description: Triggered when the business may prepare, serve, sell, or handle food or beverages.

tasks.title: Verify food-safety and health-department requirements
tasks.agency: Arizona Department of Health Services and applicable local health authority
tasks.description: Food businesses must identify the applicable health authority and confirm plan-review, food-safety, commissary, inspection, and permit requirements.
tasks.whenNeeded: Before buying specialized equipment, preparing food for sale, or launching operations.
tasks.dependency: Document menu, preparation model, vehicle or facility plan, and operating locations.
tasks.founderNotes: Record the local health authority, permit path, inspection requirements, and commissary determination.

industrySpecificFlags.label: Alcohol or liquor licensing review
industrySpecificFlags.description: Triggered when alcohol sales, service, or distribution may apply.

tasks.title: Verify Arizona liquor-license requirements
tasks.agency: Arizona Department of Liquor Licenses and Control
tasks.description: Confirm liquor-license requirements before selling, serving, or distributing alcohol.
tasks.whenNeeded: Before committing to an alcohol-related offer, location, or event.
tasks.dependency: Define the alcohol activity and operating location.
tasks.founderNotes: Record the license series, local review, timeline, and agency guidance.

industrySpecificFlags.label: Construction or contractor licensing review
industrySpecificFlags.description: Triggered when construction, home improvement, installation, repair, or contractor work may apply.

tasks.title: Verify Arizona contractor-license requirements
tasks.description: Confirm whether the planned construction, repair, installation, or contracting activity requires an Arizona contractor license.
tasks.whenNeeded: Before advertising, bidding, or performing regulated contractor work.
tasks.dependency: Define the scope of work and responsible qualifying party.
tasks.founderNotes: Record the license classification and Registrar guidance.

industrySpecificFlags.label: Professional licensing review
industrySpecificFlags.description: Triggered when regulated professional services may apply.

tasks.title: Verify Arizona professional-license requirements
tasks.agency: Arizona eLicense portal and applicable licensing board
tasks.description: Search the applicable Arizona licensing board and confirm whether the planned professional service requires an individual or business credential.
tasks.whenNeeded: Before offering a regulated professional service.
tasks.dependency: Identify the exact professional service and responsible license holder.
tasks.founderNotes: Record the board, credential, renewal schedule, and responsible license holder.

industrySpecificFlags.label: Employer, payroll, and workforce review
industrySpecificFlags.description: Triggered when the business plans to hire employees or run payroll.

tasks.title: Register Arizona employer accounts when staffing begins
tasks.description: Review Arizona employer-registration, tax, wage-reporting, and unemployment-account requirements before or when hiring employees.
tasks.whenNeeded: Before or when hiring employees, based on agency requirements.
tasks.dependency: Obtain the EIN and document the staffing plan.
tasks.founderNotes: Record account numbers, registration dates, payroll provider, and filing cadence.

tasks.title: Verify Arizona workers-compensation coverage
tasks.description: Confirm workers-compensation coverage obligations and obtain appropriate insurance before covered employees begin work.
tasks.dependency: Document employee roles and request insurance guidance or quotes.
tasks.founderNotes: Record carrier, policy number, effective date, and coverage confirmation.

tasks.title: Review Arizona unemployment-insurance employer requirements
tasks.description: Review unemployment-tax registration, reporting, payment, and employer-account responsibilities.
tasks.whenNeeded: When the business hires employees or otherwise meets agency registration requirements.
tasks.dependency: Obtain the EIN and establish employer accounts.
tasks.founderNotes: Record the unemployment account and reporting cadence.

verifyWarning: Verify with the official Arizona state, local, and activity-specific agency before filing, spending money, signing a lease, hiring, or relying on this checklist.
